sicCodes.SICCSPageTitle: WELSH -  Check the partnership's nature of business
sicCodes.SICCSTableHeader: WELSH -  Update the nature of business if it has changed. You can do this by adding or removing SIC codes.
sicCodes.SICCSAddSICInsetTitle: WELSH -  Add a new nature of business
sicCodes.SICCSAddSICInsetInstructions: WELSH -  Start typing a keyword to see a list of business activities. For example, 'finance'. Or, enter the SIC code if you know it.
sicCodes.SICCSWhatIsDetailExpanderParagraph1: WELSH -  The SIC (Standard Industrial Classification) codes indicate the partnership's nature of business. A partnership can have up to 4 codes.
sicCodes.SICCSWhatIsDetailExpanderParagraph2: WELSH -  Search for a business activity using keywords that best describe what the partnership does. If you can't find an exact match, search for other keywords that relate to the partnership's activities.
sicCodes.SICCSWhatIsDetailExpanderParagraph3Link: WELSH -  SIC codes list (opens in a new tab)
sicCodes.SICCSWhatIsDetailExpanderParagraph3End: WELSH -   may help you find a suitable business activity.
sicCodes.SICCSNoSICCodeParagraph1: WELSH -  There are no SIC codes registered for this limited partnership.
sicCodes.SICCSNoSICCodeParagraph2: WELSH -  You only need to provide SIC codes if the nature of business has changed.
sicCodes.SICCSRemovedAllCodes: WELSH -  You have removed all the SIC codes for this limited partnership.
